# Q6 alter+round — round per-host average (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q6 alter+round — round per-host average.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp avg(bytes_out) as avg_out by host | alter avg_out_rounded = round(avg_out) | sort desc avg_out_rounded
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 8). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
